It performs a simple mathematical calculation with no side effects, no external dependencies, and no malicious behavior.\n\n---\n\n### **Report 1**\n- **Summary:** Correctly identifies the function as a simple remapping utility, with no anomalies or suspicious behavior.\n- **Analysis & Conclusion:** Accurate;
